description: Noah Prince discusses Tuktuk, an on-chain automation engine developed at Helium, which allows for scheduled tasks on the Solana blockchain. He demonstrates its functionality with a subscription service that automates token distribution to wallet holders, showcasing its use cases in governance and DeFi.
topic_summary: Tuktuk enables on-chain automation for scheduled tasks on Solana, addressing the need for reliable cron jobs after the shutdown of Clockwork in 2023. It offers a cost-effective solution for various applications, including governance and DeFi.
